name: CERO THERAPEUTICS HOLDINGS, INC.
business: CERO Therapeutics is an immunotherapy company developing next-generation engineered T cell therapeutics for cancer treatment. Its lead product candidate, CER-1236, is an autologous T-cell product targeting TIM-4 ligand for both hematological malignancies and solid tumors. The company has initiated a Phase 1 clinical trial for acute myeloid leukemia and plans to expand to other indications.
sellsTo: patients with hematological malignancies and solid tumors

exposures.sentence: We are an innovative immunotherapy company advancing the development of next-generation engineered T cell therapeutics for the treatment of cancer.

catalysts.event: Initiation of Phase 1 clinical trial for CER-1236 in acute myeloid leukemia
catalysts.sentence: In May 2025, we initiated our Phase 1 clinical trial, designed to evaluate the safety, potential therapeutic utility and applicable dose of CER-1236 in patients with acute myeloid leukemia ( AML ).

catalysts.event: FDA Orphan Drug Designation for CER-1236 in AML
catalysts.sentence: In July 2025, CER-1236 received an FDA Orphan Drug Designation for the treatment of acute myeloid leukemia.

catalysts.event: FDA Fast Track Designation for CER-1236 in AML
catalysts.sentence: In September 2025, CER-1236 received FDA Fast Track Designation.

catalysts.event: Expansion of clinical trial to include MDS and MF patients
catalysts.sentence: Based on favorable interim safety results and effects in one patient, the trial was expanded to include patients with Myelodysplastic Syndrome ( MDS ) and Myelofibrosis ( MF ).

catalysts.event: Initiation of Phase 1 study in NSCLC and ovarian cancer
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate initiation of a Phase 1 study in NSCLC and ovarian cancer in the first quarter of 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Sales of CAR-T cell therapies are expected to exceed $10 billion globally by 2030.
tamClaims.sentence: Sales of CAR-T cell therapies are anticipated to grow rapidly over the next several years and are expected to exceed $10 billion globally by 2030.

tamClaims.claim: Solid tumor cancers accounted for more than 1.7 million of the 1.9 million people newly diagnosed with cancer in 2022.
tamClaims.sentence: The American Cancer Society estimates that solid tumor cancers accounted for more than 1.7 million of the 1.9 million people newly diagnosed with cancer in 2022.

tamClaims.claim: AML accounts for 90% of all acute leukemias in adults, with an estimated 22,010 new cases and 11,090 estimated deaths in the United States in 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: According to the American Cancer Society, AML accounts for 90% of all acute leukemias in adults, with an estimated 22,010 new cases and 11,090 estimated deaths in the United States in 2025.

tamClaims.claim: There are over 10,000 cases of MDS diagnosed annually in the US.
tamClaims.sentence: There are over 10,000 cases of MDS diagnosed annually in the US.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 500 MF cases per year in the US.
tamClaims.sentence: Approximately 500 MF cases per year in the US.
